reviews.comment:
Me atendió una señora en el área de cafetería, la cual me trató y hablo súper mall , le pedí si podía pasar al baño , a lo cual me dijo q solo era para clientes q consumían ,el problema es q estaba dejando pasar gente q no consumía nada y Ami no m dejó pasar , ella selecciona a quien dejar pasar , en todo momento le hable bien y ella me hable súper mall y me trató horrible

(Translated by Google)
I was served by a woman in the cafeteria area who treated me and spoke to me very rudely. I asked if I could use the restroom, and she told me it was only for customers who were buying something. The problem is that she was letting people in who weren't buying anything, but she wouldn't let me in. She selects who she lets in. I spoke to her politely the whole time, but she spoke to me very rudely and treated me horribly.

reviews.comment:
Pásame a cargar combustible venías de viaje de Madryn pásamos a tomar un café pero de la cosina venía un aroma muy rico y mirando los platos vecinos pedimos milanesas con papas fritas. Pollo al champiñon mi nena se pidió una hamburguesa papas muy ricas la comida exquisita buen sabor cocción riquísimo todo lo recomiendo no sacamos fotos porq no quedo ni el rastro gracias Neuquén

(Translated by Google)
Stop by for gas. We were coming from Madryn and stopped for coffee, but a delicious aroma was coming from the kitchen. Looking at the other dishes, we ordered breaded cutlets with fries. Chicken with mushrooms. My daughter ordered a hamburger. The fries were delicious. The food was exquisite, with great flavor and perfect cooking. Everything was delicious. I highly recommend it. We didn't take any pictures because there wasn't a trace left. Thank you, Neuquén!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xGQlNsRlFTMlJqYWpGWGQxbHlXQzFYZG5aNU9FRRAB
